case_title: CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS SMITH KIMBERLY T

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH KIMBERLY T ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO KIMBERLY SMITH, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE OUT OF COUNTY.
